content: SisuClient uses native fetch (no axios/node-fetch dep), baseUrl strips trailing slash, query params built via buildQueryString helper that filters undefined values. All methods typed against @sisu/protocol types.

name: sdk-fetch-mock-pattern
description: SDK tests mock global fetch via vi.spyOn(global, 'fetch').mockResolvedValueOnce(...) with 'as unknown as Response' cast to resolve undici-types vs Node.js built-in Response type mismatch.
